g.text: 岩 性 描 述
Yellow-green calcareous mudstone, H. parvus FAD
Dark grey bioclastic limestone, abundant fusulinids
Sandstone, mudstone, coal seams — paralic facies
Black siliceous shale with phosphate nodules
Dark grey bituminous limestone with chert
Permian-Triassic Boundary — Meishan GSSP Extended | 总厚 165m | 7 层 | 比例尺 1:649
